name: nontrivial_snarks_n10_to_28

per_order.filter_command: (snarkhunter -- direct snark enumeration, no SAT filter needed)
per_order.generator_source: caagt.ugent.be/cubic/snarkhunter-2.0b.zip (built with WORDSIZE=64, linked against nauty 2.9.3 libnautyL1.a)
per_order.generator_reason: geng+SAT filter at n=28 was projected at multi-day wall; snarkhunter generates nontrivial snarks directly using even-2-factor lookahead during canonical-orderly generation

definitions.nontrivial_snark: simple, cubic, bridgeless, girth >= 5, cyclically 4-edge-connected, chromatic index 4
definitions.cubic_g5_source: all simple connected cubic graphs of girth >= 5 from nauty geng (-d3 -D3 -c -tf), one per line in graph6 format
definitions.filter_pipeline: scripts/catalogue.py classifies each graph and keeps those matching --filter nontrivial-snark

notes: n=10..26 enumeration: nauty geng -d3 -D3 -c -tf -q n + scripts/catalogue.py SAT filter. n=28: snarkhunter-64 from caagt.ugent.be/cubic/, built locally against Homebrew nauty 2.9.3. All Krawczyk certificates produced by scripts/interval.py with dps=50, radius=1e-5; all replays via scripts/verify_sweep.py and scripts/interval.replay_krawczyk.
